top3.sql:
SELECT AVG(post_count) AS average_posts_voted
FROM (
    SELECT u.Id AS user_id, COUNT(v.Id) AS post_count
    FROM users u
    JOIN votes v ON u.Id = v.UserId
    WHERE u.Id IN (
        SELECT Id
        FROM users
        ORDER BY CreationDate ASC
        LIMIT 10
    )
    GROUP BY u.Id
) AS oldest_users_posts_voted;

SELECT AVG(post_count) AS average_posts_voted
FROM (
    SELECT v.UserId, COUNT(*) AS post_count
    FROM votes v
    GROUP BY v.UserId
) AS user_vote_counts
WHERE user_vote_counts.UserId IN (
    SELECT Id
    FROM users
    ORDER BY CreationDate ASC
    LIMIT 1
);

SELECT AVG(post_count) AS average_posts_voted
FROM (
    SELECT u.Id AS user_id, COUNT(v.Id) AS post_count
    FROM users u
    JOIN votes v ON u.Id = v.UserId
    WHERE u.Id IN (
        SELECT Id
        FROM users
        ORDER BY CreationDate ASC
        LIMIT 10
    )
    GROUP BY u.Id
) AS oldest_users_posts_voted;

SELECT AVG(posts_voted) AS average_posts_voted
FROM (
    SELECT u.Id, COUNT(v.Id) AS posts_voted
    FROM users u
    INNER JOIN votes v ON u.Id = v.UserId
    WHERE u.Id IN (
        SELECT Id
        FROM users
        ORDER BY CreationDate ASC
        LIMIT 10
    )
    GROUP BY u.Id
);

FROM (

    GROUP BY v.UserId
) AS user_vote_counts
WHERE user_vote_counts.UserId IN (

    FROM users
    ORDER BY CreationDate ASC
    LIMIT 1
);

    FROM users u
    INNER JOIN votes v ON u.Id = v.UserId
    WHERE u.Id IN (

    FROM votes v

WHERE user_vote_counts.UserId IN (

final.sql:
SELECT AVG(post_count) AS average_posts_voted
FROM (
    SELECT u.Id AS user_id, COUNT(v.Id) AS post_count
    FROM users u
    JOIN votes v ON u.Id = v.UserId
    WHERE u.Id IN (
        SELECT Id
        FROM users
        ORDER BY CreationDate ASC
        LIMIT 10
    )
    GROUP BY u.Id
) AS oldest_users_posts_voted;
